name: Pole Position
description: Pole Position is an arcade-style racing game where the player controls a Formula One race car. The primary objective is to qualify for the race by completing a timed qualifying lap on the Fuji Speedway track. If the player successfully qualifies, they then compete in a race against other computer-controlled cars. The race consists of a set number of laps (typically 4) around the same Fuji Speedway track. The player must navigate the track, avoiding collisions with other cars and roadside obstacles such as billboards. The game simulates acceleration, deceleration, and steering. The player has limited control over their gear selection. The car accelerates automatically; the player's only control over speed is acceleration or braking. The environment is a continuous scrolling track that gives the illusion of speed, with varying road curvature and elevation changes. The game features distinct roadside elements and a horizon that moves to enhance the sense of movement. The race is viewed from a third-person perspective, positioned behind and slightly above the player's car.

controls.arrow_left: Steer the car to the left.
controls.arrow_right: Steer the car to the right.
